summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend Playwright critical-flow testing for OTT redesign. Core web flows passed; one environment/config gap blocked mandated public-endpoint validation path.

critical.issue: Required public backend URL config was missing in this workspace (`/app/frontend/.env` not found and env var absent), so initial backend suite skipped all tests until fallback host was injected.

issues: `posterBackdrops` reuses identical images across multiple genres (e.g., Action/Crime, Adventure/Sci-Fi), conflicting with the unique-genre-artwork requirement.

action_items: Restore/provide `frontend/.env` with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL` so QA can run against the mandated public URL (not localhost fallback).
Update Flutter `posterBackdrops` mapping to avoid repeated artwork and keep parity with unique-genre-card requirement.
Optional parity improvement: Flutter details screen currently uses generic `liveMoviesProvider` for Similar instead of TMDB detail recommendations/similar payload; align with web behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: Web preview passed: OTT selection -> movies list -> details (Where to Watch, Cast & Crew, trailer/reco/similar/images) -> Home reset -> watched/watchlist sync -> Share Theatre trigger.
Backend `/api/tmdb/providers`, `/genres`, `/discover`, `/title` passed pytest data-shape checks when base URL was set.
Interactive-element testability gap remains in web: not all interactive controls expose stable `data-testid` (several buttons rely on class/text selectors), which increases E2E fragility.
test_credentials: Reviewed `/app/memory/test_credentials.md`: Guest and Google flows documented; no seeded email/password credentials.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL env contract is currently missing in workspace. I validated using `http://127.0.0.1:3000` fallback only. Re-run both pytest and Playwright once `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL` is restored to confirm true public ingress behavior.
rca of the issue: RCA-1 (config): API regression suite skipped because `BASE_URL = os.environ.get('REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL')` returned null and `/app/frontend/.env` is absent. Reproduction: run pytest without env injection -> all tests SKIPPED. Mitigation: restore protected env file/var in workspace. RCA-2 (Flutter parity): repeated static backdrop constants in `genre_flow_screen.dart` cause non-unique genre artwork; replace map values with distinct TMDB images per genre.
